allow: PowerShell(Write-Output "=== Conteudo de ~/.ssh ==="; Get-ChildItem "$HOME\\.ssh" -Force | Select-Object Name, Length; Write-Output "`n=== SSH config \(se existir\) ==="; if \(Test-Path "$HOME\\.ssh\\config"\) { Get-Content "$HOME\\.ssh\\config" } else { Write-Output "\(nao existe ~/.ssh/config\)" }; Write-Output "`n=== known_hosts entries pro IP ==="; if \(Test-Path "$HOME\\.ssh\\known_hosts"\) { Select-String -Path "$HOME\\.ssh\\known_hosts" -Pattern "46.225.71.122" -SimpleMatch } else { Write-Output "\(nao existe known_hosts\)" })

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== Tentando com simplifica_deploy ==="; ssh -i "$HOME\\.ssh\\simplifica_deploy" -o BatchMode=yes -o ConnectTimeout=5 -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new root@46.225.71.122 "echo CONECTOU; hostname")

PowerShell(Get-Content "$HOME\\.ssh\\id_ed25519.pub" | ssh -i "$HOME\\.ssh\\simplifica_deploy" root@46.225.71.122 "grep -qF -- \\"$\(cat\)\\" ~/.ssh/authorized_keys || cat >> ~/.ssh/authorized_keys; echo OK")
PowerShell(ssh -o BatchMode=yes -o ConnectTimeout=5 root@46.225.71.122 "echo PASSWORDLESS_OK; hostname; docker --version")

PowerShell(ssh -v -o BatchMode=yes -o ConnectTimeout=5 -i "$HOME\\.ssh\\id_ed25519" root@46.225.71.122 "echo OK" 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "Offering|Authentications|authorized|Permission|Welcome|Server accepts" -SimpleMatch)
